solution: 
```java
class Solution {
    public int minimizedStringLength(String s) {
        return (int) s.chars().distinct().count();
    }
}
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The minimal string length equals the number of unique characters since all duplicates can be removed via the allowed operations. The solution counts unique characters using a stream, which is efficient and concise.
